testcase.name: runScenario["User adds Brocolli to cart and completes checkout", "Add product to cart and place order"](1)

testcase.system-out:
@test123 Scenario: User adds Brocolli to cart and completes checkout # src/test/resources/features/AddToCart.feature:3 Browser from XML: null FINAL Browser: chrome 10:21:22 [TestNG-test-CucumberTest-1] INFO DriverFactory - Launching browser: chrome pages.GreenKartPage@14a76d6d Given user launches the GreenKart application # stepdefinition.GreenKartSteps.user_launches_application() When user searches for "Brocolli" # stepdefinition.GreenKartSteps.user_searches_for_product(java.lang.String) And user increases the quantity # stepdefinition.GreenKartSteps.user_increases_quantity() And user adds the product to cart # stepdefinition.GreenKartSteps.user_adds_product_to_cart() And user proceeds to checkout # stepdefinition.GreenKartSteps.user_proceeds_to_checkout() And user places the order # stepdefinition.GreenKartSteps.user_places_the_order() org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchElementException: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//select"} (Session info: chrome=147.0.7727.117) For documentation on this error, please visit: May 01, 2026 10:21:26 AM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 147 May 01, 2026 10:21:26 AM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 147.0.7727.117. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.15.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.system-err: May 01, 2026 10:21:51 AM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 147 May 01, 2026 10:21:51 AM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 147.0.7727.117. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.15.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
